description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a decorative white railing. The roof is a steep mansard style with patterned shingles and two brick chimneys, featuring ornamental details and small attic windows. The facade is symmetrical, with evenly spaced windows on both floors and a central front door accessed by a short flight of steps. The sides of the house display additional windows, some grouped and some single, set in a plain brick wall. The porch extends across the front, providing a sheltered entryway, and the house sits on a raised foundation with brick steps leading up. The overall appearance is traditional, with classic American residential architectural elements and a solid, substantial build.
description: A traditional two-story brick house with a mansard roof, decorative front porch, and symmetrical window arrangement. Features include two chimneys, patterned roof shingles, and a raised entryway with steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch with white columns and railing, and decorative roof with two chimneys.
description_view_1: Side view revealing plain brick walls, two sets of windows, and the depth of the porch extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simpler facade, symmetrical window placement, and the back steps leading up to a secondary entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar window arrangement as the other side, showing the full length of the porch and brickwork.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, white columns, decorative railing, and overhanging roof
